title: Update module github.com/containers/common to v0.64.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/common](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common) | `v0.63.1` -> `v0.64.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fcommon/v0.64.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fcommon/v0.63.1/v0.64.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/common (github.com/containers/common)</summary>

### [`v0.64.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.64.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/compare/v0.63.1...v0.64.0)

#### What's Changed

- Bump to c/storage v1.58.0, c/image v5.35.0, c/common v0.63.0 by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://redirect.github.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2423](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2423)
- config: drop SetDefaultConfigFilePath($CONTAINERS\_STORAGE\_CONF) by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2420](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2420)
- chore(deps): update module golang.org/x/net to v0.38.0 \[security] by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2425](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2425)5
- Clarify configuration when using podman machine by [@​chrw](https://redirect.github.com/chrw) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2402](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2402)
- fix(deps): update module github.com/seccomp/libseccomp-golang to v0.11.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/common/pull/2428](https://redirect.github.com/containers/common/pull/2428)8

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
The testing-farm failures seem like an infra issue. Older runs were passing, so we can ignore them for now.
